executives.name: Frank Blome
executives.background: CEO of PowerCo SE, the battery company of Volkswagen Group. He has held various senior positions at Volkswagen AG since 2017.

executives.name: Jens Wiese
executives.background: Head of Group M&A and Investment Advisory at Volkswagen AG. Former Senior Partner at Roland Berger.

executives.name: Kevin Hettrich
executives.background: Mr. Hettrich has served as our Chief Financial Officer since 2018. He joined QuantumScape in 2012 and has held various roles in finance and product management. Prior to QuantumScape, he worked at Bain & Company and the U.S. Department of Energy.

executives.name: Siva Sivaram
executives.background: Dr. Sivaram has served as our Chief Executive Officer since February 2024 and as a member of our Board since September 2023. Prior to joining QuantumScape, he served as President of Western Digital Corp. from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President of Silicon Technology from 2016 to 2020. He previously held leadership roles at SanDisk and Matrix Semiconductor.

executives.name: Timothy Holme
executives.background: Dr. Holme is a co-founder of QuantumScape and has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2010. He holds a Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering from Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Blome
board_of_directors.background: CEO of PowerCo SE, the battery company of Volkswagen Group. He has held various senior positions at Volkswagen AG since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Jens Wiese
